target: r=3 compact factorization + determinant nonvanishing triage
claim_boundary: No finite-level spectral, determinant, rank, kernel, or factorization result may be upgraded into a Collatz-level theorem.
codex_start_prompt: $collatz-research-orchestrator read plans/ACTIVE_CODEX_PLAN.md and execute it exactly. Use subagents where useful. Run Python reconnaissance first, collect witnesses, audit proof boundaries, and promote to Sage exact algebra only when the plan's promotion rules are satisfied. Commit only scripts, reports, witness data, theorem-candidate notes, and safe plan-status updates. Do not claim or imply a Collatz proof.
non_goals: finite spectral closure implies global orbit behavior
numerical eigenvalue multiplicity proves algebraic multiplicity
r=2 mechanism automatically transfers to r=3
canonical-bundle patch without audited Patched classification

phases.name: Create orchestration report
commands: python3 .agents/skills/collatz-research-orchestrator/scripts/orchestrate.py --target "r=3 compact factorization and determinant nonvanishing triage" --run-preflight --out-prefix r3_next_research_cycle

phases.name: Triage Python results
required_questions: Did spectral-fast reveal repeated unit/full structure across s=0.50,0.55,0.60?
Did modular probes produce stable nonzero determinant witness patterns?
Did factor-python reveal compact factor candidates or decompositions?
Did cross-level reveal exact-test-worthy invariant structure?
Which exact Sage target is justified next?
Which claims should be rejected or downgraded?

phases.name: Sage promotion
phases.promotion_rule: Only run Sage after Phase E identifies a concrete exact target.

subagents.algebra_explorer: Identify symbolic structures, exact factorization hypotheses, quotient/residual decompositions, determinant candidates, and invariant decompositions.
subagents.experiment_runner: Run commands, preserve logs/witnesses/failed probes, never overwrite timestamped artifacts.
subagents.proof_auditor: Audit all reports and witness summaries; reject finite-level-to-Collatz escalation.
subagents.implementation_engineer: Fix only harness defects blocking execution; do not alter mathematical definitions unless explicitly directed.

acceptance_criteria: proof-boundary validation has been run after reconnaissance and any Sage step
final report exists in Markdown and JSON
every mathematical claim has a project claim label
Sage execution failure, if any, is recorded as blocker
next exact target is clearly recommended
